---
title: "Table 3: Annual Nitrogen Losses"
author: "Jared Flater et al."
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: show
    code-tools: true
    self-contained: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: true
---

# Setup

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(janitor)
library(gt)
library(emmeans)
library(multcomp)

plot_area_ha <- (120 * 160) / 107639.1041671

# Display order and rename map
trt_levels <- c("Maize", "Soy", "Sorghum", "Sorghum + WCC")
trt_rename  <- c("Corn" = "Maize", "Soy" = "Soy",
                 "Sorghum" = "Sorghum", "Sorghum + Rye" = "Sorghum + WCC")

# Preza-Fontes environmental cost coefficients
cost_n2o      <- 16.18   # USD kg-1 N2O-N
cost_leaching <- 18.54   # USD kg-1 NO3-N
```

# Data

## N₂O — interpolated cumulative per plot

```{r n2o-data}
flux_data <- read_csv("data/cleaned_flux_data.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date), year = year(date))

daily_flux_summary <- flux_data |>
  group_by(plot, rowvs_interrow, treatment, year, date) |>
  summarise(mean_flux = mean(gnha_day_no_negative, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(plot, rowvs_interrow, treatment, year, date)

interpolate_daily_flux <- function(data) {
  combos <- data |> distinct(plot, rowvs_interrow, treatment, year)
  purrr::map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(combos)), function(i) {
    combo <- combos[i, ]
    sub   <- data |>
      filter(plot == combo$plot, rowvs_interrow == combo$rowvs_interrow,
             treatment == combo$treatment, year == combo$year) |>
      arrange(date)
    all_days <- seq(as.Date(paste0(combo$year, "-01-01")),
                    as.Date(paste0(combo$year, "-12-31")), by = "day")
    valid <- sub[!is.na(sub$mean_flux), ]
    flux_interp <- if (nrow(valid) >= 2)
      approx(as.numeric(valid$date), valid$mean_flux,
             xout = as.numeric(all_days), rule = 1)$y
    else rep(NA_real_, length(all_days))
    tibble(plot = combo$plot, rowvs_interrow = combo$rowvs_interrow,
           treatment = combo$treatment, year = combo$year,
           date = all_days, interpolated_flux = flux_interp)
  })
}

interpolated_flux_data <- interpolate_daily_flux(daily_flux_summary)

# Annual cumulative N2O per plot (g → kg); average across row/interrow
plot_n2o <- interpolated_flux_data |>
  group_by(plot, rowvs_interrow, treatment, year) |>
  summarise(annual_cumulative_n2o = sum(interpolated_flux, na.rm = TRUE) / 1000,
            .groups = "drop") |>
  filter(is.finite(annual_cumulative_n2o)) |>
  group_by(plot, treatment, year) |>
  summarise(annual_cumulative_n2o = mean(annual_cumulative_n2o, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(Treatment = factor(recode(treatment, !!!trt_rename), levels = trt_levels))
```

## Leaching — cumulative per plot

```{r leaching-data}
leaching_data <- read_csv("data/clean_leaching.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  clean_names() |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date), year = year(date)) |>
  filter(year %in% c(2023, 2024))

annual_leaching <- leaching_data |>
  group_by(plot, treatment, year) |>
  summarise(
    annual_cumulative_leaching = (max(cumulative_n_loss_mg, na.rm = TRUE) / 1e6) / plot_area_ha,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  filter(is.finite(annual_cumulative_leaching), annual_cumulative_leaching >= 0) |>
  mutate(plot      = as.character(plot),
         Treatment = factor(recode(treatment, !!!trt_rename), levels = trt_levels))
```

## Plot-level combined N loss and EDC

```{r combined-data}
plot_combined <- plot_n2o |>
  mutate(plot = as.character(plot)) |>
  inner_join(annual_leaching, by = c("plot", "treatment", "year")) |>
  mutate(
    Treatment       = Treatment.x,   # both identical after recode
    combined_n_loss = annual_cumulative_n2o + annual_cumulative_leaching,
    edc             = (annual_cumulative_n2o * cost_n2o) +
                      (annual_cumulative_leaching * cost_leaching)
  )

cat("Plots with both N2O and leaching data:\n")
count(plot_combined, year, Treatment)
```

# Tukey Letter Helper

```{r letter-helper}
compute_letters <- function(df, value_col) {
  d    <- df |> filter(!is.na(.data[[value_col]]))
  trts <- unique(as.character(d$Treatment))
  if (length(trts) < 2) return(tibble(Treatment = factor(trts, trt_levels), letter = "a"))

  fit <- lm(as.formula(paste(value_col, "~ Treatment")), data = d)
  emm <- emmeans(fit, ~ Treatment)
  cld(emm, adjust = "tukey", Letters = letters) |>
    as_tibble() |>
    transmute(Treatment, letter = gsub("\\s+", "", .group))
}
```

# Summary Statistics with Tukey Letters

```{r summaries}
summarise_col <- function(df, value_col, result_col, with_letters = TRUE) {
  letters_df <- if (with_letters) {
    df |> group_by(year) |>
      group_modify(~ compute_letters(.x, value_col)) |> ungroup()
  } else NULL

  out <- df |>
    group_by(Treatment, year) |>
    summarise(mean_v = mean(.data[[value_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
              sd_v   = sd(.data[[value_col]],   na.rm = TRUE),
              .groups = "drop")

  if (with_letters) {
    out <- out |> left_join(letters_df, by = c("Treatment", "year")) |>
      mutate(!!result_col := sprintf("%.2f \u00b1 %.2f (%s)", mean_v, sd_v, letter))
  } else {
    out <- out |>
      mutate(!!result_col := sprintf("$%.1f \u00b1 %.1f", mean_v, sd_v))
  }
  out
}

# Annual summaries
n2o_summary      <- summarise_col(plot_n2o,       "annual_cumulative_n2o",      "n2o_result")
leach_summary    <- summarise_col(annual_leaching, "annual_cumulative_leaching",  "leaching_result")
combined_summary <- summarise_col(plot_combined,   "combined_n_loss",             "combined_result")
edc_summary      <- summarise_col(plot_combined,   "edc",                         "edc_result",
                                  with_letters = FALSE)

# Add Tukey letters to EDC separately (same groupings as combined)
edc_letters <- plot_combined |> group_by(year) |>
  group_modify(~ compute_letters(.x, "edc")) |> ungroup()
edc_summary <- plot_combined |>
  group_by(Treatment, year) |>
  summarise(mean_v = mean(edc, na.rm = TRUE), sd_v = sd(edc, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  left_join(edc_letters, by = c("Treatment", "year")) |>
  mutate(edc_result = sprintf("$%.2f \u00b1 %.2f (%s)", mean_v, sd_v, letter))
```

# Two-Year Totals (plot-level sums → ANOVA → Tukey letters)

```{r two-year-totals}
# Two-year rows: sum of annual treatment means, SD propagated in quadrature.
# This is consistent for all treatments regardless of plot rotation.

# Per-plot sums used only for Tukey letters (captures within-treatment variability
# across plots; for rotating crops the plots are year-specific but the ranking is
# still meaningful).
plot_two_year <- plot_combined |>
  group_by(plot, treatment, Treatment) |>
  summarise(
    n2o_2yr      = sum(annual_cumulative_n2o,      na.rm = TRUE),
    leaching_2yr = sum(annual_cumulative_leaching,  na.rm = TRUE),
    combined_2yr = sum(combined_n_loss,             na.rm = TRUE),
    edc_2yr      = sum(edc,                         na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

get_two_year_letters <- function(value_col) {
  fit <- lm(as.formula(paste(value_col, "~ Treatment")), data = plot_two_year)
  emm <- emmeans(fit, ~ Treatment)
  cld(emm, adjust = "tukey", Letters = letters) |>
    as_tibble() |>
    transmute(Treatment, letter = trimws(.group))
}

# Displayed two-year mean = sum of annual means; SD = quadrature from annual SDs.
# annual_df must have columns: Treatment, year, mean_v, sd_v
make_two_year <- function(result_col, annual_df, letters_df, dollar = FALSE) {
  annual_df |>
    group_by(Treatment) |>
    summarise(
      mean_v = sum(mean_v,      na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_v   = sqrt(sum(sd_v^2, na.rm = TRUE)),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    left_join(letters_df, by = "Treatment") |>
    mutate(
      year = "2023\u20132024",
      !!result_col := if (dollar)
        sprintf("$%.2f \u00b1 %.2f (%s)", mean_v, sd_v, letter)
      else
        sprintf("%.2f \u00b1 %.2f (%s)", mean_v, sd_v, letter)
    )
}

two_yr_letters_n2o      <- get_two_year_letters("n2o_2yr")
two_yr_letters_leach    <- get_two_year_letters("leaching_2yr")
two_yr_letters_combined <- get_two_year_letters("combined_2yr")
two_yr_letters_edc      <- get_two_year_letters("edc_2yr")

n2o_two_year      <- make_two_year("n2o_result",      n2o_summary,      two_yr_letters_n2o)
leach_two_year    <- make_two_year("leaching_result",  leach_summary,    two_yr_letters_leach)
combined_two_year <- make_two_year("combined_result",  combined_summary, two_yr_letters_combined)
edc_two_year      <- make_two_year("edc_result",       edc_summary,      two_yr_letters_edc, dollar = TRUE)
```

# ANOVA — Source of Variation

```{r anova}
fmt_p <- function(p) case_when(
  p < 0.001 ~ "< 0.001",
  p < 0.01  ~ sprintf("%.3f", p),
  TRUE       ~ sprintf("%.2f",  p)
)

aov_n2o      <- aov(annual_cumulative_n2o      ~ factor(year) * Treatment, data = plot_n2o)
aov_leach    <- aov(annual_cumulative_leaching  ~ factor(year) * Treatment, data = annual_leaching)
aov_combined <- aov(combined_n_loss             ~ factor(year) * Treatment, data = plot_combined)
aov_edc      <- aov(edc                         ~ factor(year) * Treatment, data = plot_combined)

source_variation <- tibble(
  Treatment        = c("Treatment", "Year", "Year \u00d7 Treatment"),
  n2o_result       = map_chr(summary(aov_n2o)[[1]][2:1,      "Pr(>F)"] |> c(summary(aov_n2o)[[1]][3, "Pr(>F)"]), fmt_p),
  leaching_result  = map_chr(summary(aov_leach)[[1]][2:1,    "Pr(>F)"] |> c(summary(aov_leach)[[1]][3, "Pr(>F)"]), fmt_p),
  combined_result  = map_chr(summary(aov_combined)[[1]][2:1, "Pr(>F)"] |> c(summary(aov_combined)[[1]][3, "Pr(>F)"]), fmt_p),
  edc_result       = map_chr(summary(aov_edc)[[1]][2:1,      "Pr(>F)"] |> c(summary(aov_edc)[[1]][3, "Pr(>F)"]), fmt_p),
  year             = "",
  year_order       = 4
)
```

# Assemble Table

```{r assemble}
join_cols <- function(...) {
  reduce(list(...), left_join, by = c("Treatment", "year"))
}

annual_rows <- join_cols(
  n2o_summary      |> mutate(year = as.character(year)) |> select(Treatment, year, n2o_result),
  leach_summary    |> mutate(year = as.character(year)) |> select(Treatment, year, leaching_result),
  combined_summary |> mutate(year = as.character(year)) |> select(Treatment, year, combined_result),
  edc_summary      |> mutate(year = as.character(year)) |> select(Treatment, year, edc_result)
) |> mutate(year_order = case_when(year == "2023" ~ 1, year == "2024" ~ 2))

totals_rows <- join_cols(
  n2o_two_year      |> select(Treatment, year, n2o_result),
  leach_two_year    |> select(Treatment, year, leaching_result),
  combined_two_year |> select(Treatment, year, combined_result),
  edc_two_year      |> select(Treatment, year, edc_result)
) |> mutate(year_order = 3)

separator <- tibble(
  year = "Source of Variation", year_order = 3.5, Treatment = factor(NA, trt_levels),
  n2o_result = "", leaching_result = "", combined_result = "", edc_result = ""
)

table3_complete <- bind_rows(annual_rows, totals_rows, separator, source_variation) |>
  mutate(Treatment = as.character(Treatment)) |>
  arrange(year_order, factor(Treatment, c(trt_levels, "Treatment", "Year", "Year \u00d7 Treatment"))) |>
  mutate(
    year_display   = case_when(
      year == "Source of Variation" ~ year,
      year != lag(year, default = "") ~ as.character(year),
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    is_new_section = year != lag(year, default = "") & year != "Source of Variation"
  )
```

# Table 3

```{r table3}
table3_gt <- table3_complete |>
  select(
    Year              = year_display,
    Treatment,
    `NO3-N Leaching`  = leaching_result,
    `N2O Loss`        = n2o_result,
    `Combined N Loss` = combined_result,
    `EDC`             = edc_result,
    is_new_section
  ) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(title = md("**Table 3. Annual nitrogen losses and environmental costs**")) |>
  cols_label(
    `NO3-N Leaching`  = md("NO<sub>3</sub>\u2013N Leaching<br>(kg N ha<sup>\u22121</sup>)"),
    `N2O Loss`        = md("N<sub>2</sub>O Loss<br>(kg N ha<sup>\u22121</sup>)"),
    `Combined N Loss` = md("Combined N Loss<br>(kg N ha<sup>\u22121</sup>)"),
    `EDC`             = md("Total Environmental Cost<br>(USD ha<sup>\u22121</sup>)")
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_borders(sides = "top", weight = px(1), color = "gray"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = is_new_section == TRUE)
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_borders(sides = "top", weight = px(2)),
    locations = cells_body(rows = Year == "Source of Variation")
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = Year == "Source of Variation")
  ) |>
  cols_width(
    Year              ~ px(95),
    Treatment         ~ px(140),
    `NO3-N Leaching`  ~ px(160),
    `N2O Loss`        ~ px(155),
    `Combined N Loss` ~ px(160),
    `EDC`             ~ px(165)
  ) |>
  cols_hide(columns = is_new_section) |>
  cols_align(align = "center", columns = -c(Year, Treatment)) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = paste0(
      "Values are mean \u00b1 SD. Letters indicate Tukey HSD groups within year (\u03b1\u2009=\u20090.05). ",
      "Two-year row is the sum of annual means; SD propagated in quadrature. ",
      "Combined N Loss = N\u2082O\u2013N + NO\u2083\u2013N leaching. ",
      "Environmental costs based on Preza-Fontes cost coefficients: ",
      "$", cost_n2o, " kg\u207b\u00b9 N\u2082O\u2013N and $", cost_leaching, " kg\u207b\u00b9 NO\u2083\u2013N."
    )
  )

table3_gt
```

# Save

```{r save}
gtsave(table3_gt, "SubmissionFiguresTables/Table_3_Nitrogen_Losses.rtf")
```
